result:
Green. Build succeeded with only pre-existing warnings.

## Report

**Modified:** `crates/lua-vm/src/api.rs` (added inherent method `LuaState::check_number` at ~line 472, between `check_arg_string` and `opt_arg_integer`).

**What it does:** Implements `luaL_checknumber`: converts the slot at `arg` to `f64` via the free `to_number_x` helper (which accepts ints, floats, and number-shaped strings via `to_number_with_strconv`). On failure, fetches the actual value via `index_to_value` and returns `LuaError::type_arg_error(arg, "number", &got)` — the standard `bad argument #N (number expected, got <type>)` message. Inherent-method-wins resolution silences the `LuaStateStubExt::check_number` trait default in `state_stub.rs:199` without editing the shim.

**New surfacing todos:** None inside this impl — `to_number_x`, `index_to_value`, and `LuaError::type_arg_error` are all already-implemented free helpers / constructors.

**Build:** `cargo build -p lua-cli` is green (pre-existing warnings only, no new errors).
